periods.label: 23 April 2026 export
periods.summary: Across the supplied exports, 5 brands were analysed. Toyota Slovenija generated the highest impressions, while Toyota Slovenija generated the highest total engagement.

report.summary: During the reviewed export period, the brand published 181 pieces of Instagram content and generated 430.9k impressions. The strongest readout comes from creator-led posts with measurable engagement, while caption analysis highlights the main promoted models and recurring content themes.

community.sentimentSummary: Analysed comments are mostly positive. Positive cues account for 51% of detected sentiment and negative cues for 4%.

report.summary: During the reviewed export period, the brand published 104 pieces of Instagram content and generated 274.3k impressions. The strongest readout comes from creator-led posts with measurable engagement, while caption analysis highlights the main promoted models and recurring content themes.

community.sentimentSummary: Analysed comments are mostly positive. Positive cues account for 53% of detected sentiment and negative cues for 0%.
positiveExamples: To pa nebo drzalo drugi najbolj prodajen je Skoda octavia, Golf je tretji najbolj prodajen….

report.summary: During the reviewed export period, the brand published 21 pieces of Instagram content and generated 55k impressions. The strongest readout comes from creator-led posts with measurable engagement, while caption analysis highlights the main promoted models and recurring content themes.

community.sentimentSummary: Analysed comments are mostly positive. Positive cues account for 64% of detected sentiment and negative cues for 9%.
positiveExamples: Pa tudi, ko pogledaš v vzratno ogledalo ali bočno te vseeno zaslepi, vsaj mene ko kakšen tak avtomobil zapelje za mano. Tako, da nič ne pomaga če on ne osvetli tvojega avtomobila, luči v ogledalih še vedno vidiš in te res oslepijo. Vsaj mene.

Ciril, pojdi v Peking...boš na lastna ušesa slišal kako "tiha" so električna vozila kjer vsi vozniki neprestano pritiskajo oz konstantno drži hudo, saj se vozil ne sliši in se dogajajo nesreče...torej so se "rešili" hrupnih fosilnih vozil in dobili zelo "tihe" električne...zvočno onesnaženje se jim je povečalo, karbo odtis se pa ni znižal. Prav nič.
negativeExamples: teli matricni žarometi imajo tudi eno slabo in nevarno lastnost. Ko se namreč nekdo s takimi žarometi pripelje za tabo, ti pa voziš npr. nek oldtimer z relativno šibkim snopom  žarometov (ali pa samo dotrajan xenon, kar ni redkost) se tisti spredaj znajde v svoji senci in ne vidi praktično nič. Kam lahko to pelje pa vemo.....

report.summary: During the reviewed export period, the brand published 119 pieces of Instagram content and generated 621.7k impressions. The strongest readout comes from creator-led posts with measurable engagement, while caption analysis highlights the main promoted models and recurring content themes.

community.sentimentSummary: Analysed comments are mostly positive. Positive cues account for 52% of detected sentiment and negative cues for 3%.
negativeExamples: Ljudje se ne zavedajo, koliko je zahtevno shranjevati in pretakati tekoči vodik, še NASA ima probleme z vodikom. Dejstvo, da jim je ratalo spravit vse to v format normalne pumpe je mindblowing.
Žal ne bo nikoli v uporabi. Zabloda tehnologije kar se avtomobilov tiče.  Se lahko pospravi.
